summary: We recommend recording B3 in the outcomes-mcp QUEUE as in_progress rather than done because the actual landing happens via opensubagents outcomes pull 10 which is currently auto-merge armed but not yet merged. The tradeoff is that the QUEUE briefly shows an in_progress row but this is the correct state for cross-repo work where the merge is not under this repo gate. The cross-repo PR opensubagents outcomes pull 10 carries its own dogfood pair which verified locally at five point zero before push so the gate on the outcomes spec repo will evaluate against the spec repo gate not against this orchestrator queue.

claims.statement: QUEUE row for B3 reflects in_progress status with the runroc field pointing at the cross-repo PR URL on opensubagents outcomes because the QUEUE md table now contains the URL https github com opensubagents outcomes pull 10 in the runroc_path column.

citations.title: outcomes-mcp QUEUE md row for B3 after this PR merges
cross-repo PR that lands the submodule on outcomes spec repo

claims.caveats: The B3 row will flip to done once the cross-repo PR merges; this is expected to happen automatically given auto-merge is armed and the outcomes gate is already green on similar pairs.

claims.statement: tick log includes a line for tick 5 noting the cross-repo PR opensubagents outcomes pull 10 was opened with auto-merge armed because the QUEUE md tick log section appends two lines for tick 5 covering the B3 progression and the unchanged outcomes 3 firefighter triage.

citations.title: QUEUE md tick log section with tick 5 lines
heartbeat payload step 6 requires the tick log line per tick

claims.caveats: If the cross-repo PR fails CI the tick log will note that next tick and the firefighter subagent will be spawned on it.

claims.statement: the parallel outcomes repo PR carries its own outcome and report pair scoring above the floor verified locally before push because the python HeuristicVerifier returned overall five point zero on the pair at outcomes mcp-server-submodule outcome json and outcomes mcp-server-submodule report json in the outcomes spec repo.

citations.title: outcomes spec repo dogfood outcome for B3 cross-repo PR
outcomes spec repo dogfood report for B3 cross-repo PR

claims.caveats: The five point zero local score does not guarantee the outcomes gate will pass; the gate also runs orphan and slug-collision checks which are independent of the score.

open_questions: Should the orchestrator wait one tick before marking B3 done locally even after the cross-repo PR merges so that a sync verifies the submodule pointer landed correctly on outcomes main?
methodology_notes: Cross-repo work executed in the outcomes spec repo working directory then this tick records the bookkeeping in outcomes-mcp. Both PRs carry their own dogfood pair. Verified locally before each push.
